architecture.summary: 6-line fix in checkExistingIssue() to add epicKey/featureId field checks. No architectural changes.

integrations.summary: Fixes JIRA/ADO integration dedup. GitHub not affected. Field name mismatch between backfill and check.

ui-ux.summary: N/A — no UI changes. CLI output unchanged.

performance.summary: N/A — adds 2 additional property checks per provider. Negligible overhead.

security.summary: N/A — no auth, secrets, or input validation changes.

edge-cases.summary: Both old (issueKey/workItemId) and new (epicKey/featureId) field names supported. Null/missing fields handled by optional chaining.
